rules.message: Propellant fuel type doesn't match the motor.
Fuel tank and oxidizer tank aren't a matching pair.
Flight computer needs more voltage than the battery supplies.
This guidance system needs the Dual-Deploy Flight Computer to work.

ignition_fail.hint: Use propellant with the same fuel type as the motor.

engine_stall.hint: Match the fuel tank with its correct oxidizer tank pair.

computer_crash.hint: Upgrade to a battery with higher voltage, or use the Basic Flight Computer.

guidance_confused.hint: Install the Dual-Deploy Flight Computer before adding this guidance system.

thrust_low.hint: Add a stronger motor/engine or remove heavy parts to improve thrust-to-weight ratio.

unstable_flight.hint: Add stronger fins or a lighter nose cone to improve stability.

recovery_overweight.hint: Use a bigger parachute or reduce the rocket's total weight.
